title: Klaxon a livr earthquake map with no back end
content: Klaxon is a live earthquake map that displays real‑time seismic data without relying on a dedicated backend server. It aggregates information directly from public sources, processes the data client‑side, and updates the map dynamically, providing users with up-to‑date earthquake activity in a lightweight, serverless setup.

title: 《大理一年》：逃离北京的人，为什么最后都去了大理？ | 原文
content: “Dali One Year” examines why many people who leave Beijing gravitate to Dali. The author traces the song “Go to Dali,” once a folk tune, becoming a broader metaphor for escaping corporate life, bad living conditions, and prescribed paths. The book describes real-life stories of departure, emphasizing that Dali is not a fixed solution but the start of new questions. It critiques urban burnout and frames leaving Beijing as a social diagnosis rather than a fairy‑tale escape.

Montpellier’s other pairings will involve players such as Omar Doru, Arshad, and a match between the other two brothers in the remaining sets. The fixture lineup highlights Fan’s key role in the contest.

title: 又诞生一位千亿女富豪
content: The share price of Luxshare Precision rose over 55% in early April, reaching a market value of 554.2 billion RMB on May 11. Founder Wang Laichun owns 18.75% of the company, making her personal net worth exceed 100 billion RMB, becoming a new domestic billionaire woman. Luxshare’s growth followed a series of strategic acquisitions, notably of the electric‑vehicle parts group Jingxi International, expanding its Tier‑1 automotive capabilities and reducing reliance on Apple. The company’s valuation has increased nearly 40 times since its 2010 IPO.

title: AI围攻菜市场：算法驱赶“烟火气”
content: The article argues that Chinese tech giants will not abandon the vegetable market; instead, they will use AI to reshape it. With fresh‑food sales worth trillions, community buying remains profitable once AI cuts logistics costs by fixing and automating stores, pricing, and delivery. AI deployments—smart cameras, dynamic pricing, unmanned warehouses—shift control to algorithms, lowering marginal costs and replacing human labor. While traditional markets retain intangible appeal, the coming generation’s reliance on app ordering and AI vending may erode the “smoky‑fire” atmosphere, making it hard to preserve.

title: 税收和特朗普让英国的状况比斯塔默接手时更糟
content: Taxes and former U.S. President Donald Trump have contributed to worsening economic conditions in the United Kingdom, leaving the country in a poorer state than when Prime Minister Keir Starmer took office. The report attributes the decline to policy changes and fiscal measures that have undermined growth, employment, and public services, shaping a broader analysis of Trump’s impact on UK tax and economic policy.

title: 3个人带100个AI程序员，一个月烧掉130万美元！OpenAI：钱我出
content: Three people operating 100 AI agents spent $1.3 million in one month, a cost OpenAI reimbursed. The team, led by Peter Steinberger, used the agents to handle routine software engineering tasks—code reviews, security checks, bug fixing, and monitoring—freeing human developers from repetitive work. The expenditure reflects the token cost, and Steinberger cautions that as prices fall, such AI-driven “software maintenance” could become routine even for small startups, fundamentally changing how engineering teams operate.

title: 四川大摆荡坠亡事故直接原因是「释放开关提前松开」，还有哪些细节值得关注？暴露出运营方存在哪些管理漏洞？
content: A high‑speed “big swing” in Sichuan’s Xikou area killed a tourist on 3 May when the release switch disengaged prematurely, sending him into a steep cliff. The suspended swing, operated by Chongqing Adventure Camp, was inspected and certified as safe, yet the tester reports and operator training were incomplete. The incident exposed gaps in safety oversight, poor training of staff, and a lack of specific national standards for cliff swings. Authorities are investigating the failings and have suspended all rides in the park.

title: 20-30岁黄金十年：别让短暂的多巴胺，偷走了你跨时空套利的筹码
content: The author reflects on a former wealthy friend’s downfall, using it to warn 20‑30‑year‑olds about premature luxury and short‑term dopamine. He identifies three lessons: 1) “wealth” is often misread as consumption; luxury items rapidly lose value and drain cash flow, leaving little cushion during downturns. 2) True delayed gratification channels cash into assets that generate future compounding, not into fleeting pleasures. 3) Long‑term thinking means investing in time‑valued assets—stocks, hard assets, and knowledge—rather than depreciating goods, building resilience for future crises.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 杨爽511

title: 28亿，肯德基也要被卖了？
content: IYH Group is selling 1,000 fast‑food outlets—including KFC, Pizza Hut, BHC, and its own PHD pizza service—in Hong‑Kong, Macau, Taiwan, Myanmar, and Vietnam. The deal, valued at about US$400 million (≈CNY 2.8 billion), will be auctioned this week. Potential buyers include Yum China, Blackstone, and Taiwan’s Unified Enterprise, each pursuing different value‑creation strategies, such as operational overhaul, regional consolidation, or supply‑chain synergies. The sale reflects the broader trend of foreign fast‑food brands localizing ownership in China and Asia.

title: 6.4k Stars！用Claude Code写论文的全套流水线，有人打包开源了
content: The “academic‑research‑skills” (ARS) GitHub project (6.4k stars) offers a Claude Code pipeline that automates research, writing, review, and finalization of academic papers. Four multi‑agent teams handle literature search, drafting, peer review, and workflow orchestration. Built-in checks—citation verification with Semantic Scholar, a 7‑point AI error checklist, a devil‑advocate rebuttal system, and three‑layer data isolation—aim to prevent hallucinations and preserve quality. The pipeline is installable with two commands and outputs markdown, DOCX, or LaTeX, costing a few dollars per paper.

title: gap 满 5 个月了，开始焦虑了，还会有点自我怀疑
content: After quitting their job in December 2025, the person has been out of work for five months and is now feeling anxious and self‑doubtful. Over the last two weeks, they had only two interview opportunities, one of which was outsourced, and although the conversations covered topics like agents and RAG, no further steps were taken. They also notice marketing accounts amplifying anxiety, which heightens their own stress. The overall job‑search situation feels extremely difficult, but they are determined to keep pushing forward.

title: 女儿考试倒数第一，爸爸逆向教育称「你考越好对我越没用」，这会对孩子产生哪些影响？适合被其他家长效仿吗？
content: 女儿考试倒数第一爸爸得知后淡定不已，一番逆向教育脑路太清晰 5月17日，一段父亲回应女儿考倒数第一的视频引发关注。对话中，父亲以逆向逻辑安慰女儿：“你考得差反而能留在我身边工作，考好了对我没用”，并给了5元零花钱鼓励其“以快乐为主”。‌‌

title: 另一种视角
content: The author evaluates several sectors—optics, memory, domestic tokens, PCB manufacturing, and others—by examining shareholder concentration and the impact of AI trends. Optics stocks show highly concentrated ownership and significant upside, especially in upstream equipment and silicon photonics. Memory and regulatory‑sensitive token sectors have limited participation due to risk aversion. PCB upstream sub‑segments like copper foil and high‑speed lasers also offer growth. The piece contrasts these with broader markets such as renewable energy and traditional values, noting that AI‑driven participation remains lower than in renewables.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 门捷列夫学徒

title: 你爱焦虑吗？原来有一种焦虑，竟是老天爷赏的长寿天赋？！最新国人研究：ERIS神经质特质，能显著降低死亡风险，甚至比零神经质人群更长寿 | 原文
content: Recent Chinese research found that a particular anxious personality trait, ERIS neuroticism, can reduce mortality risk and may even extend lifespan compared to non‑neurotic individuals. The study challenges the view that anxiety is purely detrimental and suggests evolutionary benefits to this trait.

title: 血脂越低越安全？近50万人研究揭秘：低密度脂蛋白低于1.8，脑出血风险反升！最佳值竟是3.36 | 原文
content: A large Chinese study of nearly 500,000 healthy adults found that extremely low LDL cholesterol is not safer. The research, published in the journal *Engineering* by the National Cardiovascular Disease Center and Fuwai Hospital, shows that LDL levels below 1.8 mmol/L are linked to increased risk of cerebral hemorrhage, with the optimal protective level around 3.36 mmol/L. Thus, for people without cardiovascular disease, pursuing ultra‑low cholesterol may raise health risks.

title: 【读书】【内容篇】Netflix那些事儿：优爱腾要学起来没那么容易 | 原文
content: Netflix rose by offering a low‑priced, subscription‑based streaming service that competed with expensive cable bundles. Its success hinges on original and licensed content, constant acquisition, and a “flywheel” model where more content attracts subscribers, which in turn fuels further investment. The platform balances content and technology to maintain high streaming quality. Unlike domestic Chinese platforms such as Youku, iQiyi, and Tencent Video, Netflix’s global reach, production focus, and pricing strategy differ significantly.

title: 为卷香港知名幼儿园，国内家长把自己送进了监狱 | 原文
content: In Hong Kong, several mainland parents attempted to secure spots for their children in a popular kindergarten by bribing school officials. Over 2019‑2021, they paid HK$20,000–200,000 through intermediaries to gain admission. The anti-corruption bureau’s strict system exposed the scheme, and the parents faced legal action that culminated in imprisonment. The case illustrates the failure of “connections and bribes” in Hong Kong’s transparent education and law‑enforcement framework.

title: 我被堵在霍尔木兹海峡的79天：导弹、股票、小青菜 | 原文
content: A Chinese mariner, Liu Yuwen, has been stranded for 79 days in the Strait of Hormuz after his oil‑and‑gas vessel anchored near Port Haifeng. The location lies close to Fayzhrad, a key military target, and is surrounded by regional tension. Liu, a second‑officer from Jilin, reports that ship positions and history are frequently altered by “mysterious forces,” and that he has had to check in on other Chinese crew members via radio as the situation affects both security and nearby oil markets.

title: 《经济学人》丨人工智能引发的大规模失业将史无前例 | 原文
content: The Economist reports that a future mass unemployment crisis caused by artificial intelligence would be unprecedented. Recent U.S. polls show people are more pessimistic about long‑term job prospects than during the 2007‑2009 financial crisis, with 22 % believing they could lose their jobs within five years. A separate poll indicates nearly one in five wage earners think AI or automation will threaten their employment. The piece warns that AI‑driven job displacement could reach historic levels.

title: 世卫组织宣布刚果埃博拉疫情为国际关注的突发公共卫生事件

content: 趁着周末，自己来搞了一个中转站，目前就缺号了。那么各位大佬们，有没有比较便宜的 plus 购买方式？？对于土区那种价格购买 plus ，我是可以接受的。但是以正常价格购买，感觉有点贵尼。

title: 年薪132万美元，黄仁勋儿女管的却不是芯片
content: NVIDIA’s 2026 proxy shows CEO Jensen Huang’s children, Madison (Acc. $1.232M) and Spencer (Acc. $1.32M), hold non‑core roles: Madison leads Omniverse simulation, Spencer leads robotics product management. Despite a 149% pay jump, they are excluded from NVIDIA’s core profits (data‑center GPU sales). This strategy places heirs on future strategic tracks—robotics and simulation—rather than current cash‑cows, aiming to preserve legacy while developing next‑generation assets.

title: Hosting a website on an 8-bit microcontroller
content: The article discusses the feasibility and methods of serving a web site from an 8‑bit microcontroller. It outlines the resource constraints—limited RAM, flash, and CPU speed—and explains how lightweight web servers can be implemented using simple HTTP parsing, minimal caching, and static content delivery. The piece also considers networking options (e.g., UART‑to‑Ethernet bridges) and practical examples of small‑scale web services that run efficiently on such constrained hardware.

title: 宗馥莉“挥刀”，娃哈哈代工厂“人事大地震”
content: After stepping down as Wanhua president, Zhongfuli accelerated a “cutting‑inside” overhaul of the company’s main contract‑manufacturing arm, Hongsheng Group. Senior managers in administration, sales, law, and production have all been sacked, and the firm is outsourcing non‑production functions, cutting staff and restructuring departments to reduce costs amid poor performance. Hongsheng’s deliveries lag at 15% of targets, with significant inventory and compliance issues. Zhongfuli remains a major shareholder, owning nearly 30% of Wanhua.

title: 上海·徐汇量子黑客松大赛2026开幕
content: 2026 年 5 月 16 日，「上海·徐汇 量子黑客松大赛 2026」在上海徐汇西岸正式开幕。本次大赛由徐汇区科学技术委员会、上海未来产业基金、上海徐汇资本投资有限公司联合主办，上海汇资投资有限公司、开源中国共同承办，上海科学院、中器无量、太一量生、华翊量子、仪电集团、沐曦股份…
source: 开源中国-全部 - 大东BE

content: U.S. institutional investors now view AI demand differently: they focus on whether supporting infrastructure can keep pace with computing growth rather than merely proving AI’s existence. Core chip holders like NVIDIA and Broadcom remain staples, while AMD has been trimmed. Cloud giants (Google, Amazon, Meta) are accumulated for their strong cash flows. Investments shift from AI servers to power, cooling, and data‑center infrastructure, and from traditional networking gear to AI‑optimized Ethernet and optical components. Storage and manufacturing equipment that supply high‑speed, high‑capacity needs are also gaining priority.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 陆家嘴幽灵

title: 48022桌需退款，这家网红店出了什么事？
content: The “Past‑Long‑Ago” lamb‑skewer chain issued refunds to 48,022 tables after discovering their electric rotisserie ovens were over‑relying on digital temperature guns that misread the internal heat. The flawed method caused slow cooking and reduced meat quality. The chain, with 142 stores, voluntarily refunded over 1.1 million yuan, citing a systemic quality control failure during rapid expansion. The incident sparked debate about standardizing food quality versus relying on employee expertise and highlighted broader challenges in scaling traditional barbecue restaurants.

title: 拉美各国对玻利维亚动荡局势的担忧日益加剧
content: Latin American Nations Amp Up Their Concerns Over Bolivia Unrest (www.bloomberg.com) 08:43

The AI news brief covers several updates: Codex released a major update adding custom keyboard shortcuts, faster Git operations (10–50× speed‑up), and smoother thread handling; it also fixed GPT‑5.5 performance issues and reset paid user quotas. Vercel Labs unveiled “Zero,” an experimental language for AI agents, currently unstable and intended for testing. WeChat Reading added an AI assistant skill for book search, note export, and data analysis. OpenAI partners with Malta to grant citizens a year of free ChatGPT‑Plus after AI training courses. Shanghai Telecom has introduced token‑based pricing for large‑model API usage and a free trial for local users.

title: A股千亿新“股王”，副总“摊上事了”？
content: Yuanjie Technology, an A‑share market‑king with a market cap of over 130 billion RMB, faces a sudden shock when its deputy CEO Chen Wenjun is arrested for alleged criminal activity. The company, which saw a 321% revenue lift and 1,179% profit jump in Q1 2026, has high client concentration and a limited scale, making it vulnerable to market shifts. Despite the arrest, operations remain stable while the firm continues to expand its data‑center product line and AI‑driven chip production.

title: 印度错失了人工智能的发展良机，如今其作为市场宠儿的地位可能已不复存在
content: India has missed key opportunities to advance artificial‑intelligence technology, weakening its position as a market favorite. Experts suggest that the country’s current status as a leading tech hub may not be sustainable, as rival markets and emerging AI developments challenge its growth prospects.

title: 留给 AI的最后一个难题，是它
content: The article argues that while AI already boosts productivity in software and other sectors, the greatest opportunity lies in health. Technological progress has historically turned labor-intensive work into abundant, low‑cost products, and similar gains are now needed for medicine. Current biomedical advances, such as monoclonal antibodies and genomic sequencing, still lag behind AI‑enabled data analysis and scaling. As AI lowers research and development costs, future breakthroughs could make disease prevention, early detection, and curative therapies affordable for most people, turning health into a new frontier of prosperity.

title: 2026 05 17 HackerNews
content: Hacker News covered a wide range of tech news: Mitchell Hashimoto warned that companies are trapped in an “AI psychosis” that prioritizes rapid fixes over resilient architecture, California passed a law requiring refunds or offline versions when online games shut down, the DOJ subpoenaed Apple and Google for extra‑green‑vehicle app users, a satirical post highlighted the fragility of npm’s supply chain, a developer swapped Tailwind for more semantic CSS, ABC removed all FiveThirtyEight pieces, AI is breaking open‑source CTFs, a SQL‑based fraud‑detection framework was shared, Zulip formed a nonprofit foundation to safeguard privacy, and NVIDIA released the open‑source 2.6 B‑parameter SANA‑WM model for 1‑minute 720p video generation.

title: 104岁邓铁涛：四大养生体系+24条长寿细则
content: This article condenses 104‑year‑old Deng Tiantao’s longevity practices into a comprehensive guide. It promotes a balanced routine of morning awakening exercises, timed meals, midday sun exposure, and gentle evening activities. Core principles emphasize regular sleep, modest diet favoring vegetables, fish, nuts, and no excess, along with preventive movement such as Tai Chi, Eight‑Section Bar, and foot massage. Emotional wellbeing, modest living, and consistent habits are highlighted as essential for long life.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 鑫鑫-投资

content: 早在1999年行业内部的一次新工艺白酒研讨会上，著名白酒专家沈怡方高工在会上指出，当时采用食用酒精生产的新工艺白酒达到70%。 "据业内人士估算，目前我国白酒市场上70%以上属于新工艺白酒，而真正纯粮固态发酵白酒不到30%。"— 新浪财经…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 酒金岁月

title: OpenAI 与马耳他达成协议，当地所有民众可免费使用 ChatGPT Plus 一年
content: OpenAI has signed an agreement with the Maltese government to provide all residents with free access to ChatGPT Plus for one year after completing an AI training course. Launched in May, the program will expand as more citizens finish the training and is also available to overseas Maltese. Malta is the first country to offer such a plan, though the financial terms of the agreement were not disclosed.

title: 因芯片技术授权，Arm 面临美国反垄断调查
content: Arm is under investigation by the U.S. Federal Trade Commission for potentially monopolizing parts of the semiconductor market by refusing or downgrading chip‑technology licenses. The probe is part of a broader global review, with regulators outside the U.S. also examining Arm’s activities. Qualcomm has sued the EU Commission over restrictions on technology access, and Arm’s shift toward designing its own chips has raised concerns about limiting competitors’ access to essential technology.

title: OpenAI 携手 Plaid，向大众提供个性化财务建议
content: OpenAI has partnered with data platform Plaid to give users personalized financial advice. By tapping Plaid’s access to most U.S. bank accounts, ChatGPT can offer recommendations that reflect a user’s actual financial situation, moving AI further into personal finance. While the integration improves relevance, some asset data gaps remain. The move signals a growing trend of AI services in finance, though readers are cautioned to consider market risks when investing.

title: 国内首笔 数据中心接入虚拟电厂参与电力现货市场交易
content: On May 14, China’s first large data centers participated in the electricity spot market as a virtual power plant, demonstrating “compute with the grid.” Three major centers—China Unicom’s Shaoguan, China Mobile’s Guangzhou, and Zhuhai—joined the Guangdong Power Investment’s virtual power plant platform to trade and settle spot‑market electricity, enabling flexible spot purchases.

title: 上海电信率先发布 Token 资费套餐：1 元对应 25 万额度点 支持手机账单付
content: Shanghai Telecom launches a Token billing plan where ¥1 equates to 250,000 token‑points (e.g., sufficient for 250,000 input tokens on the KiMi‑K2.5 model). The service, available immediately to Shanghai Telecom customers, supports mobile bill payment, offers pay‑as‑you‑go ordering, and provides discounts for larger purchases.

title: AI 芯片公司 Cerebras 上市大涨 51%
content: Cerebras Systems, an AI‑chip maker, went public on Nasdaq at $185 a share, raising about $5.55 billion in its largest U.S. IPO since 2026. The stock opened at $385, fell 10 % the next day, and is up 51 % from the issue price with a market cap of $60.2 billion. Founded in 2016, the company’s WSE-3 chip is much larger and faster than Nvidia’s, but it faces risks from limited memory capacity, dependence on a single $200 billion contract with OpenAI, and expected slower revenue growth and lower margins in 2026.

title: 马斯克称他不会出售任何 SpaceX 股票
content: Elon Musk stated that he will not sell any SpaceX shares.

title: 网传「三大运营商即将免月租」？官方回应
content: Social media rumors claim China’s three major mobile carriers are soon to eliminate monthly rent fees with pay‑per‑use plans. In reality, only China Unicom has a zero‑rent "Magic Cube" plan that requires a minimum spend (39 ¥ in some areas, 55 ¥ in Beijing), while traditional monthly plans still exist. China Mobile and China Telecom have confirmed they have never adopted a zero‑rent model and have no such plans in development.

title: OpenAI 上市前大规模重组，总裁 Brockman 挂帅

title: 蜜雪冰城 CEO 疑朋友圈隔空回复黄仁勋：最顶级的显卡 往往需要最纯粹的散热方式
content: NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang visited a MiXue Bing Cheng café in Beijing’s Nanluoguxiang. He tried the 8‑yuan peach “Four‑Season Spring” drink, gave it a thumbs‑up, and posed with visitors. MiXue CEO Zhang Yuan posted photos on WeChat and posted on the company’s Weibo account, confirming that the product was indeed the same. Media outlets reported that the CEO’s WeChat message replied to Huang’s post, noting that top‑tier graphics cards require pure cooling solutions.

title: Japan’s robot wolf sells out as record bear attacks drive demand
content: Japan’s robot wolf, a $2.5 million technological toy, sold out on the first day of its release as demand surged after a record‑setting bear attack event drew attention to wildlife hazards. The incident increased public interest in protective measures, boosting sales of the robotic wolf platform designed to monitor and respond to animal threats.

title: 委内瑞拉向企业发布《石油法》实施细则草案
content: Venezuela has released a draft of the new Oil Law Regulations, outlining how the law will be implemented for companies. The document, announced by the government, provides details on compliance and regulatory procedures for the oil sector. It is intended to guide enterprises in understanding and following the updated legal framework regarding oil exploration, production, and related activities.

title: 在伊朗战争阴影下，全球库存争夺战愈演愈烈
content: The article notes that amid the uncertainties of the Iran conflict, global competition for inventory has become more intense. Companies and markets are scrambling to secure supplies, leading to tighter inventories and heightened supply‑chain competition.

title: 亚冠二级决赛，大阪钢巴1-0爆冷战胜C罗领衔的利雅得胜利，获得亚冠二级冠军，如何评价这场比赛？
content: The AFC Champions League second division final saw Gamba Osaka defeat Riyadh Victory, led by Cristiano Ronaldo, 1-0 in an upset victory. Gamba Osaka secured the second‑tier Asian title with a defensive performance that limited the high‑profile opposition. The win highlights their resilience and tactical discipline, proving they can compete against clubs featuring top international talent.

title: You don't know HTML Lists
content: A Hacker News discussion titled “You don’t know HTML Lists” critiques misunderstandings about HTML list elements. It points out common mistakes in using <ul>, <ol>, and <li> tags, highlights proper semantics, and advises on accessibility and responsive design. The post encourages readers to review proper HTML list documentation and examples to avoid sloppy coding practices.

title: 国内的企业是压根不在乎域名吗
content: The author notes that many global companies use short, brand‑recognizable domain names such as redd.it or youtu.be, making their origin clear at a glance. In contrast, Chinese firms rarely do this; for example, Bilibili still uses the unmeaningful b23.tv, and even once popular domains like tianmao.com are no longer common. The author questions why Chinese enterprises lack this awareness.

title: Windows 9x Subsystem for Linux
content: The Windows 9x Subsystem for Linux is a feature that allows certain Linux utilities to run on Windows 9x systems, enabling compatibility between Unix-like programs and the older Windows operating environment.

title: 曼城 1-0 击败切尔西夺得 25/26 赛季足总杯冠军，如何评价本场比赛？
content: Manchester City beat Chelsea 1‑0 to win the 25/26 FA Cup, marking the club’s eighth title. In the first half, a Hand‑of‑the‑Goal by Erling Håland was ruled offside, and Chelsea failed to score any shots on target. In the second half, Håland assisted Theo Semmence, who finished with a left‑foot curl to secure the victory. This triumph added to Guardiola‑led City’s 20 trophies in the past decade.
